title: AN ACT NAMING THE PROVINCIAL ROAD FROM THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MAGDALENA UP TO PAWA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MATNOG, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AS GOV. JUAN G. FRIVALDO HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 5392; 105 OG No. 42, 6223 (October 19, 2009)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9702, August 07, 2009 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE PROVINCIAL ROAD FROM THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. MAGDALENA UP TO PAWA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MATNOG, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AS GOV. JUAN G. FRIVALDO HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The provincial road from the Municipality of Sta. Magdalena up to Pawa Road in the Municipality of Matnog, Province of Sorsogon shall hereinafter be known as Gov. Juan G. Frivaldo Highway.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 2. The Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after this publication in a newspaper circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on December 3, 2008 and May 25, 2009, respectively.

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARAUA-YAP

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

APPROVED: Aug, 07, 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
